---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# team-ready AI Adoption Placeholder

This is placeholder enablement guidance for the public/private GitHub reference implementation. It is not real adopting-organization policy.

When drafting documentation or instructions for early AI-tool users:

- preserve source provenance and link back to upstream references;
- separate verified facts from assumptions and recommendations;
- prefer small repeatable workflows over large conceptual frameworks;
- include the target runtime where the artifact is meant to be consumed;
- call out approval gates for secrets, private repositories, production systems, and team-wide rollout;
- write for a capable analyst or engineer who is new to agent/runtime customization.
